steps: Combine the $x$-terms: $x + 2x = 3x$. Combine the constants: $5 + (-3) = 2$. The result is $3x + 2$.

• A: $3x - 2$ — The constant is $+2$, not $-2$. Eliminated.
  • B: $3x + 2$ — Matches exactly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • C: $3x - 8$ — Incorrect constant; would require $5 - 3 = -8$, which is false. Eliminated.
  • D: $3x + 8$ — Incorrect constant; would require $5 + 3 = 8$, ignoring the minus sign. Eliminated.
